claim.observation: Targeted recursive fls output from the EWF image at partition offset 1411072 contains Chrome History, Amcache, SRUDB, and EVTX target paths that correspond to the CYLR parser surfaces.
claim.interpretation: The EWF image corroborates the targeted CYLR parser surfaces at filesystem-path level. This supports further disk-backed follow-up on these artifacts, but path presence alone does not prove parser row meaning, byte equality, user action, or transfer.
